UserPromptSubmit.description: Evaluate each interaction for extractable knowledge

PreToolUse.description: ATDD reminder: check acceptance criteria before writing source files

PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE '[^ ]*\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)'); if [ -f "$FILE" ] && grep -n 'console\.log' "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '⚠️  console.log detected — remove before committing' >&2; fi; fi
PostToolUse.description: Warn on console.log in TypeScript/JS files

Stop.description: ATDD: check if source was modified but tests are missing
